Crop Name: potato

Profile
- Season type: medium-season (TSUM total=1870 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: cool-adapted (TBASEM=3.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature only (IDSL=0, DLO=14.00 h)
- Root/water trait: shallow-rooted, more drought-sensitive (RDMCR=50.00 cm, DEPNR=3.00)
- Assimilation trait: lower assimilation potential (AMAX peak=30.00)
- Storage allocation: late storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=1.27)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0450
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0150, DVS1=0.0113
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.0570, DVS1=0.0430

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
